templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum, a set of terms that can be attached to an existing agreement to govern the use of artificial intelligence products and services.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA-covered entities and their business associates handling protected health information.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement setting out the standard terms for providing a cloud-based software service to a customer.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for collaborating with early customers to develop and test a new product or feature.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement governing the processing of personal data on behalf of a customer in compliance with data protection laws.

templates.name: Mutual NDA - Cover Page
templates.description: Cover Page for the Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, capturing the deal-specific details that incorporate the Standard Terms by reference.

templates.name: Mutual NDA - Standard Terms
templates.description: Standard Terms for the Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement protecting confidential information exchanged between two parties.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement establishing the terms of a commercial partnership, such as referral, reseller, or co-marketing arrangements.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for running a time-limited trial or proof of concept of a product or service with a customer.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement setting out the terms for providing professional or consulting services to a customer.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining service availability commitments, support response times, and related remedies.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement setting out the terms for licensing on-premise or downloadable software to a customer.
